headline_seed: Trump wants to suspend the federal gas tax as prices soar amid war with Iran - NPR
draft_text:
Trump called suspending the 18.4-cent federal gas tax "a great idea" Monday — but it requires Congress to act. NPR and CNBC both report average prices hit roughly $4.52/gal, up ~50% since the U.S.-Iran war began in February 2026.

And that's the mews.
